projectDescription: A provider-neutral Agent Skill that guides designing, generating MVP blueprints for, auditing, and refactoring agentic harnesses for OpenAI, Anthropic, and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
keyFeatures: Provider-neutral agent harness design (OpenAI, Anthropic, OpenAI-compatible APIs)
MVP agent blueprint generator for any domain
Typed tool registry with risk-class-based permission model
Planning mode, goal loops, and approval-gated execution
Context assembly, memory, retrieval, and auto-compaction
Agent Skills and MCP/external connector governance
Prompt-cache-aware context layout and cost telemetry
Security, evals, observability, and production launch gates
Compatible with Codex, Claude Code, and other Agent Skill-aware runtimes
Applicable across coding, research, finance, legal, healthcare, and operations domains
publicApiSurface: SKILL.md — skill entry point and trigger rules
references/architecture.md — component model and harness boundaries
references/agentic-loop.md — loop invariants, retries, budgets, stopping
references/tools-and-permissions.md — typed tools, risk classes, approvals
references/planning-and-goals.md — planning mode and long-running goals
references/prompt-caching-and-cost.md — stable prefixes and cost-aware context
references/skills-and-connectors.md — Agent Skills, MCP, connectors, tool search
references/provider-api-patterns.md — OpenAI, Anthropic, compatible API patterns
references/source-links.md — official references and further reading
